endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Billing/enrollmentAccounts
endpoints.description: Lists the enrollment accounts the caller has access to.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Billing/enrollmentAccounts/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets a enrollment account by name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Billing/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available billing REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingPeriods
endpoints.description: Lists the available billing periods for a subscription in reverse chronological order. This is only supported for Azure Web-Direct subscriptions. Other subscription types which were not purchased directly through the Azure web portal are not supported through this preview API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/billingPeriods/{billingPeriodName}
endpoints.description: Gets a named billing period.  This is only supported for Azure Web-Direct subscriptions. Other subscription types which were not purchased directly through the Azure web portal are not supported through this preview API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{BILLINGPERIODNAME}} with a real billingperiodname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/invoices
endpoints.description: Lists the available invoices for a subscription in reverse chronological order beginning with the most recent invoice. In preview, invoices are available via this API only for invoice periods which end December 1, 2016 or later.  This is only supported for Azure Web-Direct subscriptions. Other subscription types which were not purchased directly through the Azure web portal are not supported through this preview API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/invoices/latest
endpoints.description: Gets the most recent invoice. When getting a single invoice, the downloadUrl property is expanded automatically.  This is only supported for Azure Web-Direct subscriptions. Other subscription types which were not purchased directly through the Azure web portal are not supported through this preview API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Billing/invoices/{invoiceName}
endpoints.description: Gets a named invoice resource. When getting a single invoice, the downloadUrl property is expanded automatically.  This is only supported for Azure Web-Direct subscriptions. Other subscription types which were not purchased directly through the Azure web portal are not supported through this preview API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{INVOICENAME}} with a real invoicename.
